title: hortonia floribunda var. ovalifolia
intro: Hortonia floribunda var. ovalifolia, also known as the oval-leaf hortonia, is a plant species native to the eastern United States. It is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae. Hortonia floribunda var. ovalifolia has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to soothe sore throats and coughs, as well as to boost the immune system.
